---
title: The Median Duck
author: Christopher Nam
output: html_document
email_address: themedianduck@gmail.com
github_repo: https://github.com/bluevolvo87/themedianduck
---

```{r echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(lubridate)
```

```{css echo = FALSE}
.author, .title {
  display: none;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 100%;
}

body {
  background-color: black;
  color: #f5f5f5;
  font-size: 1.2vw;
}
```

![](Images/The Median Duck.jpeg)


Last updated on `r today()`  
Site [developed](`r rmarkdown::metadata$github_repo`) by [Christopher Nam](mailto:`r rmarkdown::metadata$email_address`)
